name: Double Delicious Halloween Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (325°F for glass dish).
2. In a 13 x 9 inch baking pan, melt margarine in the oven.
3. Sprinkle graham cracker crumbs evenly over the melted margarine.
4. Pour sweetened condensed milk evenly over the crumbs.
5. Top with milk chocolate chips and peanut butter chips.
6. Press down firmly to combine all ingredients.
7. Bake for 25-30 minutes or until lightly browned.
8. Cool before cutting into bars.
